creator: Richard.Hanby@mcc.ac.uk
text:
We have this problem too, using 1 x IDE disk + 6 x 34502LW SCSI disks
with 2940U2W controller.

Crashed 8 times in less than 24 hours under heavy-ish load.

-- 
Richard Hanby
Web Cache Support       
Manchester Computing
